title: Unify dashboard truth — execution positions only, shadow demoted to diagnostics
objective: The dashboard currently shows two competing position universes simultaneously: (1) real paper trades from the DB, and (2) shadow/advisory recommendations from the model log that were never executed. Both appear as cards in the primary Positions panel. This makes the dashboard factually incorrect — it shows positions that don't exist, miscounts open exposure, and creates a broken assembly-line mental model. Fix: the Positions panel must show ONLY executed paper trades (DB status='open'). Shadow data may still enrich those real positions (live game context, fair_win_prob) and still appears in the Shadow drawer tab. It must not generate standalone position cards.

root_cause.problem: shadowOnly block (lines 804-807) appends shadow recs that have NO matching paper trade as position cards. These are advisory model recommendations — never executed — but they appear as OPEN positions with WIN/LOSE pills, PnL figures, and TP/SL boxes. pos-count badge includes them. The user sees 4 'open positions' when only 1 real paper trade exists.
root_cause.secondary: For enriched positions, unrealized_pnl_dollars is taken from shadow's pre-computed value (uses fixed $50 estimate), not recalculated using actual paper qty from DB. Post-RISK_001, actual trade sizes vary ($50/$62.50/$75), so shadow PnL is wrong.

deliverables.label: Remove shadowOnly from Positions panel — paper trades only
Fix live PnL for enriched positions — use actual paper qty, not shadow estimate
Unify cmd-open and kpi-open with actual DB open trade count

acceptance_criteria: Positions panel shows ONLY paper trades with status='open' in DB — no shadow-only cards
pos-count badge = kpi-open KPI = cmd-open command bar stat — all three match
If zero paper trades open: panel shows 'No open positions', all counts show 0
Shadow drawer tab still works — renderShadowFeed() still renders the ticker rows there
Shadow enrichment still works — paper position cards still show game context, fair_win_prob, edge where shadow rec matches
Live PnL on enriched positions uses actual qty*price_delta, not shadow $50 estimate
verification: Open dashboard. If no paper trades are open: Positions panel shows 'No open positions', pos-count=0, kpi-open=0, cmd-open=0.
If paper trades exist: exactly that many cards appear — no extra SHADOW-badged cards in the Positions panel.
Open Shadow drawer tab: shadow ticker rows still appear there normally.
If shadow log has 5 recs but only 1 paper trade open: Positions shows 1 card (not 5).
rollback: Revert dashboard.html only. Shadow-only cards reappear in Positions panel (pre-existing behavior).
